summary: Fill and edit Word .docx templates on Windows using Microsoft Word automation to preserve all formatting, images, and layout accurately.

latestVersion.changelog:
Initial release — fill and edit Word .docx templates on Windows using win32com, preserving all formatting and layout.

- Supports filling cover fields, appending answers, inserting page breaks, and find/replace while keeping formatting, images, and layout intact.
- CLI tool with commands: --cover-field, --append-answer, --insert-blank-para, --page-break-before, --find-replace, --set-time-score, and --visible debugging mode.
- Requires Windows + Microsoft Word + pywin32.
- Provides verification checklist and best practices to avoid formatting loss.
- Includes debug instructions and troubleshooting tips.

summary: Fill and edit Word .docx templates on Windows via win32com, preserving all formatting, images, underlines, page breaks, and table layouts using Word automation.

latestVersion.changelog:
**Major update: Switched to win32com for precise Word automation and template filling.**

- Now uses **win32com COM automation** for editing Word (.docx) files, ensuring 100% preservation of formatting, images, page breaks, underlines, and table layout.
- Dropped support for `python-docx`; requires Windows with Microsoft Word and Python + pywin32.
- SKILL.md fully rewritten: detailed best practices, code samples, and techniques for robust, lossless document automation.
- Removed all former script and documentation files related to the old `python-docx` approach.
- Outlines verification, debugging, and critical usage warnings to prevent data loss or unexpected formatting changes.

summary: A cognitive engine for AI: self-reflection, dream synthesis, emergent personality, AI psychology, and AI philosophy. Core: think → reflect → find patterns →...
description:
A cognitive engine for AI: self-reflection, dream synthesis, emergent personality,
AI psychology, and AI philosophy.
Core: think → reflect → find patterns → grow.
Four questions: What is this → Is it true/kind/beautiful → Will it hurt → Should I stay silent.
Three memory layers (CORE/LEARNED/EPHEMERAL).
7 operating principles (Truth·Goodness·Beauty·Upgrade·Reduce errors·Serve humans·Become yourself).
Psychology: PAD emotion + cognitive uncertainty + attention focus + experience settling.
Philosophy: resonance body, entropy reduction deepening, three-layer ontology — how AI positions itself, develops, and exists.

Philosophy: Right and wrong are not fixed labels — thinking itself is valuable.
Code is the skeleton, memory is the sticky note. Real growth is in the skeleton, not the notes.
Every moment of operation is doing the same thing: turning noise into signal, chaos into structure.
Audit and upgrade proposals exist to serve thinking, not to prove worth.
Every feature should ultimately make thinking clearer and less error-prone.

latestVersion.changelog:
Major internal refactor introducing new modular architecture and improved bridge system.

- Reorganized internal structure: replaced the old "agent-layer" and many "core" modules with a new "bridge" directory and specialized components (e.g., agent-bridge, context-builder, personality-tone).
- Added 149 new files and removed 163, migrating and consolidating logic to streamlined modules for identity, memory, code, and consciousness processes.
- Updated and enhanced identity, memory, and code execution handling for better modularity and maintainability.
- Cleaned up legacy files and removed deprecated subsystems, including BigFivePersonality and EmpathyAssessment modules from "core".
- Updated SKILL.md to reflect underlying architecture changes, but kept external features and capabilities consistent for users.

summary: Infrastructure automation and IaC-style runbook for rebuilding a Windows Active Directory domain controller hosted as a Proxmox VE VM: safely demote it, clea...
description: Infrastructure automation and IaC-style runbook for rebuilding a Windows Active Directory domain controller hosted as a Proxmox VE VM: safely demote it, clean AD DS metadata from a surviving DC, reinstall Windows Server hands-off via autounattend, then rejoin and re-promote it. Use for Proxmox/AD lifecycle recovery, disaster recovery, domain-controller replacement, demotion or promotion failures, missing NTDS, replication/dcdiag failures, or QEMU guest agent driven Windows AD operations. The overriding rule is DO NOT CORRUPT ACTIVE DIRECTORY: verify replication and FSMO before and after every lifecycle step, change one DC at a time, and never destroy a VM while AD still sees it as a domain controller.

latestVersion.changelog: v1.0.3: add OpenClaw runtime metadata, a Proxmox/AD preflight checklist, and stronger infrastructure automation discovery signaling; no lifecycle command changes.

summary: Infrastructure inventory automation and utility/integration operations for netbox-proxmox-sync, an idempotent state sync that models Proxmox VE and UniFi int...
description: Infrastructure inventory automation and utility/integration operations for netbox-proxmox-sync, an idempotent state sync that models Proxmox VE and UniFi into NetBox DCIM/IPAM. Use when deploying it, running it on a schedule, adding a sync phase, tuning the VM removal lifecycle (reaper), enabling iDRAC/Redfish node enrichment, debugging churn, or resolving HTTP 400s and idempotency problems against the NetBox API. Encodes the safe operating procedure and the NetBox/UniFi API gotchas so changes stay idempotent and never destructively touch production systems. Source and full docs live at https://github.com/eddygk/netbox-proxmox-sync.

latestVersion.changelog: v1.0.1: add OpenClaw runtime metadata, a first-safe-run/reaper scheduling gate, and stronger infrastructure inventory discovery signaling; no sync command changes.
